_doc: PINNED BOOT IDENTITY — the single source of the expected md5s every gate/panel/bake/self-test asserts on entry (Guard 5, boot-store assertion). A build that boots on any other store HALTS on line one. Update ONLY at a bake, in the same commit that moves the store; verify_restore.sh, bootstrap.sh, run_panel.sh, ship_gates_check.py and one_source_selftest.py all read THIS file rather than carrying their own hardcoded hex. Origin: stale-boot hardening 2026-07-05 (workspace held baked-v2.4 644d1254 while the repo carried e1b4d8bf; the four data guards validate whichever dir they are imported from, so they never caught the wrong DIRECTORY).
_engine_head_note: v2.9 REFIT WIRING (2026-07-13): _merged_recover.py 7a07e369->2030e5df (L1 _PVC0 swap+V0/RUC rebuild / L4 MSD-excl+tripwire / L3 s(age), all env-gated default-ON) + rl_model.py 0c42d158->952ddb3d (L2 dial-14 / L5 trio-pickless + os import). ALL-GATES-OFF reproduces base byte-exact (n=804 sum=723075). Refit board de4baef9->8a66b4ba->f2d6e3f5 (export/display fields, 0 movers). v2.9 BAKE (2026-07-13): L7 NUMÉRAIRE re-base (display-only ÷1.0524) + adopted-curve repoint (pvc_curve_L1b.json, pick-1=3000) + Brodie owner override -> shipped board f2d6e3f5->81e48293. Engine ev()/store/config UNCHANGED (rebase is presentation); OFFICIAL cohort gate PASS 126.8/125.2/116.1 <=130 (ratios invariant). Candidate at the L-STOP (no tag/main until owner word).
_item20_note: ITEM 20 STORE-IDENTITY JOB (2026-07-13, first job post-v2.9-tag): store b0c39d78 -> 340a7a32 (bramble 2026 15g@62.4->14g@62.3, career games 91->90; afl_club imported on the 804 from the archived CSV legacy_afl_club; _club renamed _draft_club store-wide + the enumerated ten draft-backfilled; eligibilities K/G-normalized (191) + 3 owner corrections gardiner/whitlock/cooke). Board 81e48293 -> 3dc19fbb: EXACTLY 1 v mover (bramble +1, numeraire 92->93; sum 696247->696248) + 182 club-DISPLAY corrections (172 draft->current + 10 filled; houston Port->Collingwood) + lensConservation +1; back 0 movers; CAT_BY_CLUB/CAT_BY_RANGE byte-identical; panel 10/10 unchanged. Engine ev()/config/band/rl_model UNCHANGED (identity fields; only bramble's games feed ev). id_resolver club-match repointed affl_team->afl_club; collision_sentry _club->_draft_club.
_fitted_note: FITTED-ARTIFACT PINS (q97m FREEZE 2026-07-14, owner ruling): every FITTED artifact that determines the board is stamped here and asserted by boot_guard on ENTRY, exactly as the store/band/board/config are. A wrong or missing artifact HALTS on line one — the board's identity is MADE OF these, so an unpinned one is a silent cross-environment mover. 'q97m' = the q97 CEILING model (band[5], price6 weight 0.10), previously a GradientBoostingRegressor.fit() at import (_merged_recover.py:31) pinned by NOTHING — numpy OpenBLAS is DYNAMIC_ARCH so it trained per-CPU on GitHub's mixed fleet (the cross-environment CI red). It is now fitted ONCE at a bake, pickled to data/q97m.pkl, and LOADED, never fitted, by every consumer. Regenerate ONLY via refit_q97m.py at a bake (re-pins here + HALTs downstream). 'peak_model'/'pvc_snapshot'/'bust_prior' = the three further unstamped board inputs (D6): the peak-model pickle + its FROZEN train-time PVC snapshot + the bust-prior table; regenerated only by build_peak_model_v4.py at a bake.
_determinism_note: DETERMINISM FIX (2026-07-14, session_2026-07-14/determinism_fix — candidate, no bake/tag/main). PART 1 bisect measured the cross-environment board mover as par_build.py loclin's BLAS `@`+np.linalg.solve (the PAR table), NOT the NW-smoother (register item 106) and NOT price6. Replaced with an order-fixed math.fsum closed-form + LU (well-conditioned cells) and a weighted-mean fallback for rank-deficient low-pick cells; price6/NW np.dot also order-fixed in _merged_recover.py. Board e6a8e6ef -> 800bf461: 8 rucks move +1..+4 SCAR (float precision; the same 8 that wobbled across kernels), 796 unchanged, PICK1=3000. engine_head fef5719d -> 118f8ac6 (_merged_recover.py). par_build.py is not individually pinned; its effect is captured in the board md5. A1 PROVEN: native/SkylakeX == forced-Haswell == forced-Prescott(SSE) == forced-Nehalem(SSE4.2) all build 800bf461 on one box.
panel: PASS 10/10 (v2.9 BAKE numéraire board 81e48293; the 10 named in the numéraire = round(ev/1.0524): Daicos 7667 Bont 3482 Sheezel 7796 Gawn 2393 Reid 3594 Ward 1649 Moore 197 Goad 873 Smillie 1282 Green 655; raw ×1.0524 values Daicos 8069 Bont 3664 ... unchanged in the engine; deterministic; == ship_gates B4 board)
register_note: LTI_REGISTER.md — owner-authored availability sidecar, pinned as a versioned input (R-REG=R2, Chapter-3 2026-07-09). Guard 5 asserts it on entry like the store; bootstrap seeds it to the workspace; the lookalike tripwire (single_source.py) keeps it single. Owner edits it -> this pin moves in the same commit (a curation edit, NOT a store bake).

_evidence_weight_note: EVIDENCE WEIGHT (RL_EVW, 2026-07-15, session_2026-07-15/evidence_weight; candidate, no bake/tag/main). The FOUR discrete evidence regimes — the 10-game qualifying bar (_nqual), the nqual ramp (c=n/4), the PROVEN_N n=3->4 cliff (pedigree par vanishing), the exposure regime (expgate n>=4 gate) — are replaced by ONE continuous evidence weight on effective qualifying seasons E_q: pedigree fades to the T5-measured residual r=0.11 (never vanishes, R98.5); L-SMOOTH. engine _merged_recover.py 113a4223->edc47017; board 24159c49->9a9889f8 (403 movers, SigmaD -5714 num-SCAR); store 340a7a32 UNCHANGED; config c2d233ae UNMOVED (RL_EVW is a declared kill-switch, not a manifest dial: RL_EVW=0 reproduces board 24159c49 byte-exact). book RE-SEALED. A8 Berry/Tsatas holds 2.28x; B1 cohort PASSx3; A9 Ginnivan/Ward flips on the T5 residual (owner ruling). Candidate — owner tag/main promote remain owner-only.
